backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing mechanic finder backend with role-based access control, CRUD operations for mechanics and car issues, user profile management, and geolocation-based mechanic search functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the removal of CSS animations and transitions that cause blinking or flashing effects, listing affected files and components with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files describing React components, hooks, pages, and configuration with emphasis on loading states, animations removal, and UI enhancements.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS styles defining OKLCH color system variables for light and dark themes with automotive-inspired design tokens and base styling for background and foreground.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the MECH X application with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component with TanStack Router configuration, role-based route protection, authentication state management, loading states, and conditional profile setup modal rendering.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Full-page access denied component displayed when non-admin users attempt to access admin routes, with navigation back to chat page.
frontend/src/components/AdminGuard.tsx: Route guard component that verifies authentication and admin role, showing loading states during verification and access denied screen for unauthorized users.
frontend/src/components/ChatInput.tsx: Textarea-based chat input component with send button, Enter key submission, loading spinner during disabled state, and enhanced focus styling.
frontend/src/components/ChatMessage.tsx: Individual chat message bubble component with user/bot avatars, role-based styling and alignment, timestamp display, and static rendering without animations.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Application footer displaying copyright, current year, and Caffeine.ai attribution link with UTM tracking parameters.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Landing page hero section with MECH X branding, login button, and three feature cards (AI Chatbot, Find Mechanics, Expert Guidance). Uses Internet Identity authentication hook and displays loading states.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout component that wraps pages with Navigation header, main content outlet, and Footer. Provides consistent page structure across routes.
frontend/src/components/MechanicCard.tsx: Displays individual mechanic information in a card format with name, rating, specialization, contact details, and calculated distance from user location. Includes Haversine distance calculation function.
frontend/src/components/MechanicForm.tsx: Form component for adding or editing mechanic entries with fields for name, contact, coordinates, specialization, and rating. Handles validation and uses mutation hooks for backend operations.
frontend/src/components/MechanicList.tsx: Admin view displaying list of mechanics with edit and delete actions. Currently uses mock data and includes dialogs for editing and confirming deletions.
frontend/src/components/MechanicRecommen: Displays nearby mechanics based on user's geolocation with 50km search radius. Handles location permission requests, loading states, and empty results.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Top navigation bar with MECH X logo, chat/admin links for authenticated users, and login/logout button. Includes admin role checking and query cache clearing on logout.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Modal dialog component for initial user profile setup, collecting name (required), email, and phone number with form validation and submission via useSaveCallerUserProfile hook.
frontend/src/components/SkeletonLoader.t: Reusable skeleton loading component with three variants (card, text, list) for displaying placeholder content during data fetching.
frontend/src/components/Spinner.tsx: Simple animated spinner component using Lucide's Loader2 icon with configurable size (sm/md/lg) and styling.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance with Internet Identity authentication, initializing access control and invalidating dependent queries on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useChat.ts: Chat interface hook with rule-based automotive troubleshooting responses, managing message history and simulating AI processing for engine, brake, and transmission issues.
frontend/src/hooks/useGeolocation.ts: Hook for requesting and managing browser geolocation with error handling for permission denial and location retrieval failures.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for backend data operations including user profiles, roles, admin checks, and mechanic CRUD operations with automatic cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserRole.ts: Simple wrapper hook around useIsCallerAdmin that returns admin status and loading state for role-based access control.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom automotive-themed color palette using OKLCH color space, defining CSS variables for light and dark modes with orange primary, red accent, and charcoal secondary colors.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication, rendering the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page displaying a mechanic directory with add/edit/delete functionality, using a dialog modal for the add mechanic form and rendering the MechanicList component.
frontend/src/pages/Chat.tsx: Main chat interface page showing AI assistant conversation with message history, input field, and mechanic recommendations sidebar; displays HeroSection for unauthenticated users.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting and managing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence for parameters like admin tokens.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending the default theme with custom colors using OKLCH values, automotive-inspired spacing, border radius variables, Inter font family, and custom animations for accordions and fades.
project_state.json: Project metadata defining MECH X as an AI automotive assistance system with architectural notes on chat interface, admin dashboard, location services, and authentication; tracks implemented features and known issue of site blinking/flashing.
